name: Indonesian Vegetable Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 Stalks celery, cut into julienne strips
2 Italian plum tomatoes, cut into thin wedges
Garnish: raisins, toasted sesame seeds, fresh watercress sprigs, or unsalted peanuts, optional
1/2 cup Hot vegetable stock or hot water
1/2 teaspoon Dry crushed red pepper (1/2 teaspoon if you prefer a spicier flavoring)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, gently toss together salad ingredients.
2. In a small bowl, combine dressing ingredients.
3. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss again.
4. Top with garnish.
5. Advance Preparation: Both salad ingredients and dressing may be prepared in advance and refrigerated. For best quality, toss together just before serving.
Hints:
To cook bean thread, immerse it in boiling water for about 10 minutes to soften. Drain, rinse with cool water, and cut into 3-inch strands.
For those concerned about complete protein, tofu, peanuts, and sesame seeds complement one another to form a high-quality "complete" protein.
